title: Ordinance Enacting the Supplemental Budget for the Grant of Gratuity Pay to Contract of Service and Job Order Employees of the Municipal Government of Los Baños in the Amount of Three Million Pesos and 00/100 (P 3,000,000.00) to Be Taken From the Savings of the Longevity Grant for Senior Citizens As Per Municipal Ordinance No. 2021-2117.
